label: Older people
description: Work focused on people in later life: independence, social connection, end-of-life, intergenerational programmes.

label: Children and young people
description: Services, advocacy, and development work with under-25s, including youth work, early years, play, and out-of-school provision.

label: Families and carers
description: Support for parents, kinship carers, and unpaid carers — practical, emotional, and rights-based.

label: Physical health
description: Physical health promotion, prevention, long-term physical condition support (cancer, cardiovascular, respiratory, diabetes, etc.), and patient advocacy on physical illness. Excludes mental health — use mental_health for anything about psychological wellbeing, anxiety, depression, psychosis, eating disorders, or mental illness.

label: Mental health
description: Anything about psychological wellbeing or mental ill-health: anxiety, depression, psychosis, eating disorders, suicide prevention, crisis intervention, talking therapies, counselling, peer support, mental health helplines. Use this key — NOT health — whenever the activity is explicitly about the mind. A charity supporting people with mental illness belongs here even when it also touches physical health.

label: Disability
description: Work led by or for disabled people: independent living, accessibility, rights, and inclusion.

label: Social prescribing
description: Non-clinical referral pathways from primary care into community-based support.

label: Loneliness and social isolation
description: Building social connection and reducing isolation across age groups and contexts.

label: Food access
description: Community food, food justice, food banks, kitchens, and supply chain work — distinct from food banking alone.

label: Housing and homelessness
description: Housing rights, homelessness prevention, supported accommodation, and tenant support.

label: Poverty and financial inclusion
description: Income maximisation, debt advice, financial capability, fuel poverty, and anti-poverty strategy.

label: Community development
description: Place-based work building community capacity, infrastructure, and asset-based development.

label: Volunteering
description: Volunteer mobilisation, infrastructure, and the development of volunteer-led services.

label: Lived experience leadership
description: Work led by people with direct experience of the issues addressed; user-led organising.

label: Education
description: Formal and informal learning, schools work, adult education, and educational equity.

label: Employment and skills
description: Routes into work, skills development, and supporting people facing labour market disadvantage.

label: Arts and culture
description: Participatory arts, cultural production, and arts-led community work.

label: Heritage
description: Built heritage, cultural heritage, archives, and community-led conservation.

label: Environment and climate
description: Climate action, environmental justice, low-carbon transition, and adaptation.

label: Nature and biodiversity
description: Habitat restoration, conservation, and nature-based community work.

label: Transport and mobility
description: Community transport, active travel, and transport-related social inclusion.

label: Digital inclusion
description: Closing digital divides — access, skills, devices, and meaningful use.

label: Civic participation
description: Democratic engagement, deliberation, community organising, and rights-based advocacy.

label: Women and girls
description: Services, advocacy, and movements led by or for women and girls.

label: LGBTQ+
description: Services, advocacy, and movements led by or for LGBTQ+ people.

label: Race equity
description: Anti-racism, racial justice, and work led by Black and minoritised communities.

label: Refugees and migration
description: Support and advocacy for refugees, asylum seekers, and migrants.

label: Crime and justice
description: Restorative justice, prison and probation work, victim support, and youth justice.

label: Domestic abuse
description: Refuge, advocacy, perpetrator programmes, and prevention of domestic and sexual abuse.

label: Animal welfare
description: Animal protection, rehoming, wildlife rescue, and human-animal welfare interfaces.
